epigraph.quote: the wind had blown me over while I was doing yoga

per_stop.quote: We stopped for tea near a pass before a big slate mine.
Lunch - cheese pasties + later tea time ice cream at Y Maes Cafe.
a wild camping place for the night, on Wales second highest pass, Hellfire Pass, between Lake Bala + Lake Vyrnwy
After the dam we stopped for bread, loo paper, the Times + Tea.
Parts of it were hidden in the lychgate & other buildings. Now her shrine has been rebuilt.
